text: Last class I called the office and left a clear message.
Today I want to join a video call and share my screen.
Join
Log in
Mute
Unmute
Share screen
Camera
Freeze
Echo
I cannot hear you. Can you unmute?
I cannot see you. Can you turn on your camera?
Can you share your screen?
There is an echo. Could you mute, please?
Hi Karen, I just joined the call. I can see your video, but I cannot hear you.
Sorry! I was on mute. Can you hear me now? Let me unmute.
Yes, now I can hear you. But there is an echo. Could you turn off your camera for a second?
Done. The echo is gone. Now, can you share your screen so I can see the report?
Sure, one moment. Oh no, my screen just froze. I will log in again.
No problem. Join again when you are ready, and we will start the review. Take your time.
I will share my screen to show the report.
My screen froze, so I will join again.

Hi everyone, this is Daniel, your host for today's video call. Before we start, please do two quick things. First, log in with your full name, so I can see who is here. Second, turn on your camera if you can, but keep your microphone on mute until you want to speak. If you cannot hear me well, send me a quick chat message and I will check the sound. When it is your turn to present, I will ask you to share your screen. If your screen freezes, do not worry, just leave and join again. We will start in two minutes. Thank you, and welcome.

Hi Percival, this is Karen. I am sorry about the call this morning. My internet was slow, so my camera and microphone were not working well. I think you could see my video, but you could not hear me, because there was a strange echo on my side. I tried to share my screen, but it froze, so I had to log in again. Next time, please send me the link a little earlier, and I will join from a quiet room with a clean background. Talk to you soon, and thank you for your patience.

First, Percival clicks the link and joins the video call. Then, the host asks everyone to log in with their full name. After that, Percival turns on his camera but keeps his microphone on mute. Later, when it is his turn, he shares his screen to show the report. Finally, his screen freezes, so he leaves and joins the call again.
